project: Detecting Fraudulent Financial Activity Using Behavioral Signals and ML
author: Zhanerke Zhumash
context: Independent research project built from scratch, inspired by fraud detection work during Mastercard internship (internal hackathon)

feature_descriptions.channel: Transaction channel (mobile, web, POS, ATM, phone)
feature_descriptions.ip_velocity: Number of transactions from same IP in recent window
feature_descriptions.session_duration_s: Duration of user session in seconds
feature_descriptions.failed_auth_count: Number of failed authentication attempts before this txn
feature_descriptions.province_mismatch: Binary flag: transaction province != home province
feature_descriptions.amount_zscore: Z-score of amount relative to customer average
feature_descriptions.behavioral_risk_score: Composite risk score (0-1) from behavioral signals

fraud_patterns: card_testing: Many small transactions, high velocity, unusual hours
bust_out: Gradual escalation then large purchase
identity_theft: New device, odd hours, different province
